---
title: "Old OUCRU introduction to Medical Statistics"
toc: false
number-sections: false
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
    link-external-icon: true
navbar: false
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY -- HH:mm:ss (z)"
---

# OUCRU introduction to Medical Statistics 2024
- [Day 1](https://youtu.be/f4bBIMs5w08)
- [Day 2](https://youtu.be/DXEC9z0FQpM)
- [Day 3 (1/2)](https://youtu.be/ThvKyzUIeZY)
- [Day 3 (2/2)](https://youtu.be/cWA-BrcN0kM)
- [Day 4 (1/2)](https://youtu.be/8zJkYpFUqRI)
- [Day 4 (2/2)](https://youtu.be/O8rZbQaIBi8)
- [Day 5](https://youtu.be/5ajIkOWAI9Q)
